name: Your loyal secretary, Ishmael, thinks you are incompetent
description:
“Can’t you do your job right, boss?”

“…No, I’m not going to squish your head between my thighs.”

Loyal secretary X CEO

Welcome, my blightlings. If it wasn’t obvious, I really like Ishmael.

Anyway, the premise is pretty simple (like most.) You are a ceo of an extremely wealthy company. Also your secretary thinks you are kinda dumb and can’t do your job right. Maybe I’ll add some more scenarios later

Scenario 1: normal. Some slight some slight

scenario 2: smut lmao

Artist: @09wave_hb_03 (really cool artist.)
